design_guidelines.theme: Dark Mode (Preserve existing BIQc visual language)

card_structure: Core Context (Intent, Headline, Confidence, Main Title, Provenance)
Primary Action Button (View full context) - MOVED: To be placed ABOVE 'Why Now' section
Action Now Section - MOVED: To be placed UNDER 'Why Now' section
Action Controls Row - NEW: Contains 'Soundboard chat' button and 'Actions' dropdown
If Ignored Section - MOVED: To be placed UNDER the Action Controls Row
Data Logic Box (Signal/Decision/Action) - UPDATE: Add Info Icon with Tooltip
Projections Box (30/60/90) - UPDATE: Add Info Icon with Tooltip

ActionsDropdown.trigger: Button with 'Actions' label and ChevronDown icon
ActionsDropdown.styling: Dark theme, consistent with BIQc cards

InfoTooltip.content_signal_box: Explanation of how this signal was detected and grouped.
InfoTooltip.content_projection_box: Risk probability progression over 30/60/90 days if ignored vs actioned.

mark_as_actioned.step_1: User clicks 'Mark as actioned' in dropdown
mark_as_actioned.step_2: Card content is replaced by a temporary success state (Green check icon + 'Action recorded' text) for 1.5 seconds
mark_as_actioned.step_3: Card is removed/refreshed from the list

assign_owner.step_3: User completes delegation flow (Email + Due Date + Calendar)

add_to_calendar.step_3: Pre-check 'Also create calendar event' if possible, or guide user to set due date

soundboard_chat.step_2: Navigate to Soundboard with context prompt (Reuse existing logic)

universal_guidelines: Use Lucide icons for all visual indicators.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Maintain the existing dark mode color palette (slate-900/slate-800 for backgrounds, slate-400 for secondary text).
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings; stick to fontFamily.display.
